acceptance_criteria.text: Binding invariants with escalation exist as a validated record type
A frozen surface is declared, schema-validated, and has a diff-time backstop
Decisions and policies are first-class durable record types with front-matter validation
Roles are parameterized in owners.json and the optional disjoint-scope rule exists
Mandatory per-contract _audit triples are relaxed to registry-driven coverage (derive over declare)
Validation and the full test suite pass; the dashboard regenerates from source records
